title: Prophecy Proponents
entries: a militant secret society of skeptics who believe it to be necessary to reveal the illusory nature of the world.
a disgraced order of paladins who believe this will save the world from an oncoming eon of evil and degeneration.
a coterie of wizards who seek to usurp the gods by becoming the creators of a new universe.
a genie bound to the wish of a misanthrope.
the Brotherhood of Shadows, long hidden in the folds of history
the silent whisperers that haunt the alleys at night
the forgotten gods of the old world, seeking their revenge
the legions of the void, marching with a thirst for conquest
the children of the abyss, waking from their eternal slumber
an ultraterrestrial para-deity trapped within the world in a cycle of reincarnation in wretched mortal forms.
an ultranationalist faction confident that they can preserve their own lands as a habitable sliver while the rest of the world is wiped away.
an uncanny intelligent machine from the future, seeking to prevent its own abominable construction.
the demiurge, architect of falsehood, who wishes to shape a new material reality to entrap more luminous souls.
a fanatical popular movement based on a peculiar interpretation of scripture, wherein the apocalypse will result in a utopia.
an infamous company of veteran mercenaries who desire an end to all conflict.
a dryad-like creature bound to ferns instead of trees, who wants to deny the world usurped from them to the seeded and the flowered.
a ghost who would rather see the world destroyed than move further from their treasured past.
a union of overworked zeitgeists who want the turning of the ages stopped for an unmeasurable non-eon.
a beloved, preternaturally-talented composer who desires the apocalypse as the coda to their greatest symphony yet.
an immortal alchemist who has become terminally bored with everything.
a nihilist social club.
a possessing curse bound to kill all the descendants of someone who betrayed its creator tens of thousands of years ago. Most people are now descended from that someone.
a necromancer who will establish a kingdom of the dead from the bones of the old world.
invaders from a parallel timeline of secondary possibilities, seeking to supplant their primaries.
a vengeance-crazed fallen hero who thinks it is the only way to destroy the phylactery of their nemesis, a geolich.
a guild of time-travelers who believe that this cataclysmic event is the linchpin to a better future.
a cult that worships shadows, wishing to cast the world into an eternal darkness where their deities reign supreme.
a mysterious, ageless child who believes that in the aftermath, they will finally find their lost family.
an ancient dragon who thinks the destruction will allow it to hoard all of the world's magic.
a race of subterranean beings eager to reclaim the surface world they once inhabited.
a league of cursed sailors who believe the cataclysm will free them from their endless wandering on ghostly seas.
a consortium of inter-dimensional traders who believe the prophecy's fulfillment will open up new markets and realities for exploitation.
a forsaken love scorned by deities, seeking to level the playing field for their lost passion.
a hermit-prophet, once mocked and cast out, who seeks validation in the prophecy's fulfillment.
a cabal of dream-weavers who believe the world's end will lead to a more vibrant dreamscape.
a forgotten god who wishes to use the apocalypse as a grand return.
an artist collective that views the prophecy's culmination as the ultimate expression of their craft.
a group of scholars and historians who believe that only through destruction can the world's history truly be understood and preserved.
a band of celestial beings who think the world has run its course and needs a fresh start.
a swarm of ethereal insects who feed on the energies released during cataclysmic events.
a society of exiled creatures who believe the world's end will allow them to reclaim their lost kingdom.
a collective of sentient storms, eager to ravage the world unceasingly.
a tribe of lunar worshipers who believe the world's end will elevate the moon to primary celestial dominance.
a confederation of reality benders who view the apocalypse as a canvas for their next creation.
a sect of silence seekers, desiring to hush the world and its incessant noise forever.
a conclave of lost souls who believe the end will free them from their eternal torment.
a syndicate of displaced time travelers, seeing the apocalypse as the only way to reset the timeline.
an assembly of nature spirits who believe that the world's end will bring about a pure, untouched wilderness.
a congregation of fallen stars, aiming to return to the night sky by extinguishing all other lights.
a fraternity of mirrors, wanting to shatter the boundary between reflections and reality.
a coalition of forgotten deities who hope that chaos will restore faith and worship in their names.
a group of cosmic librarians who think the world's end will bring about a new chapter in the universe's story.
an order of celestial gardeners who see the apocalypse as necessary pruning for the universe to blossom.
a choir of voiceless angels, wishing to sing their silent song at the world's twilight.
a tribe of elemental shamans who believe that the cataclysm will balance the forces of nature.
a collection of ancient stone guardians, waking from eons of slumber to reshape the world.
a brotherhood of shadow mages who view the prophecy's end as a path to eternal twilight.
a cabal of wishmakers, seeking the raw emotional energy that the apocalypse will release.
a network of reality's puppeteers, wanting to cut the strings and watch the world dance into oblivion.
a guild of spellbinders, aiming to unravel the very fabric of magic with the world's end.
a clan of eternal wanderers, believing that the end will grant them a final destination.
a group of cosmic cartographers, viewing the apocalypse as a necessary edit to the universe's map.
an alliance of forgotten memories, hoping to be recalled in the world's final moments.
a coalition of void-dwellers who desire to fill the emptiness with the remnants of a broken world.
a gathering of the last of the mystic beasts, seeing the prophecy as their final hunt.
